commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes the ClawSweeper real-behavior-proof parser track Markdown fences while finding proof sections, extracting proof fields, and scanning missing-proof phrases.

PR surface: Tests +43, Other +63. Total +106 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is clear: a synthetic proof body with a fenced transcript containing a field-looking line whose value is a bare fence will desynchronize the new fence tracker before the real fields are reached. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical parser repair and regression test can address the remaining review finding on the PR branch.

target.title: fix(ci): ignore fenced headings in proof parser
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens the Real behavior proof parser so Markdown-looking headings and proof-like text copied inside fenced terminal output do not end, replace, or invalidate the proof section early.

This keeps the existing proof field requirements and mock-only checks intact. The parser now uses fence tracking for proof-section discovery, proof-section slicing, per-field value extraction, and the standalone missing-proof scan. Headings and copied phrases inside backtick or tilde fences stay transcript content; real PR-body headings and proof-field labels still delimit sections and fields outside fences.

## Context

PR #87341 exposed the original bug: its real behavior proof copied a generated prompt that contained `## TOOLS.md` inside a fenced output block. The parser treated that line as the next PR-body heading and could miss later proof fields.

Follow-up review found related edges in the same parser path: same-length info-string fences like ```` ```js ```` are content inside an outer transcript, copied headings such as `## Real behavior proof` must not become new proof sections, copied field-template lines such as `Observed result: not tested` must not become field starts, and copied standalone phrases such as `not tested` inside fenced output must not trigger the missing-proof rejection.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Real behavior proof sections and fields keep parseable content after copied terminal output that contains Markdown headings, proof-field-looking lines, and standalone missing-proof phrases such as `not tested`, including when the transcript also contains a same-length info-string line like ```` ```js ````.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout worktree `.worktrees/87390-proof-parser-fence-aware-section` on macOS, branch `codex/proof-parser-fence-aware-section`, commit `7e90e82f3525d547af69c7e49cc7eac1037c2007`, Node `v26.0.0`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a direct local node smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs` with a synthetic external PR body whose fenced terminal output contains copied `Observed result: not tested` and `What was not tested: copied template text` lines before the real fields below the transcript. Also ran the focused policy test file with the repo Vitest wrapper.

Evidence after fix: The direct node smoke returned `status: passed`, selected the real `Observed result after fix` and `What was not tested` fields below the fenced transcript, and confirmed the evidence field preserves the live command. Focused regression tests passed 1 file / 27 tests. Copied smoke output is included below.

Observed result after fix: `evaluateRealBehaviorProof` ignores copied proof-template field lines inside fenced output, preserves live evidence after the copied transcript lines, and returns `passed` instead of `missing` or `insufficient`.

What was not tested: Live GitHub Actions proof-gate rerun on commit `7e90e82f3525d547af69c7e49cc7eac1037c2007`. External autoreview was not rerun because the escalation was rejected by policy for sending workspace diff data to an external review engine; this closeout used local source inspection plus focused local parser proof instead.

Direct parser smoke output:

```text
status: passed
reason: External PR includes after-fix real behavior proof.
observedResult: Parser used the real field after the transcript and kept the gateway status evidence.
notTested: No known gaps.
evidence has live command: true
```

## Verification

- `node --input-type=module` direct parser smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` (1 file / 27 tests passed)
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Refs #87341
target.author: monkeyleet

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
